summary: Iteration 71: Shadow System Correctness Audit - COMPLETE. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend verified with UI tests - all new fields present and working correctly.

backend_api_tests: test_shadow_report_returns_meaningful_evaluations - PASS: meaningful_evaluations present, meaningful_agreement_rate in comparison
test_shadow_report_has_false_positive_negative_tracking - PASS: false_positives and false_negatives in comparison
test_status_has_no_shadow_strategy - PASS: /api/status contains no shadow contamination
test_pnl_history_has_no_shadow_entries - PASS: /api/analytics/pnl-history has no shadow strategy entries
test_status_stats_no_shadow_position_or_pnl - PASS: status stats have no shadow fields
test_shadow_report_complete_structure - PASS: all required keys present
test_all_shadow_endpoints_respond - PASS: all 4 shadow endpoints return 200
frontend_ui_tests: Quant Lab page loads with data-testid='quant-lab-page' - PASS
Shadow banner has unit-size badge ($3/signal - No accumulation) - PASS
Agreement Rate metric shows meaningful_agreement_rate (76.0% with 233 meaningful evals) - PASS
Shadow Win Rate (Binary) metric shows 0.0% with 0 binary-resolved - PASS
Open Positions table has Size column - PASS
Open Positions table has Notional column - PASS
Closed Hypothetical Trades section shows empty message (waiting for binary outcomes) - PASS
Sniper page shadow summary shows Agreement (75.8%), Unit PnL, $3/sig - PASS

evidence.binary_win_rate: 0.0 (expected - no markets resolved to binary yet)

evidence.ui_cards: False Positives and False Negatives metric cards present

evidence.api_status: No shadow strategy in components or strategies list
evidence.pnl_history: Only arb_scanner and crypto_sniper strategies (no shadow)

critical_code_review_comments: shadow_sniper.py: Well-structured with clear binary resolution logic (price >= 0.92 or <= 0.08)
shadow_sniper.py: FP/FN tracking correctly computed at resolution time only
QuantLab.jsx: Size and Notional columns properly added to open positions table
QuantLab.jsx: Resolution column with color-coded resolution_type in closed trades table
Sniper.jsx: Shadow summary shows meaningful_agreement_rate correctly
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live shadow system data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 validated the shadow system correctness audit. Key points verified: (1) Sizing metadata with type=unit_size and per_signal_size=3.0 in /api/shadow/report, (2) meaningful_evaluations and meaningful_agreement_rate split from overall agreement_rate, (3) binary_win_rate and binary_resolved_count fields present (both 0 because no markets have resolved to binary outcomes yet - expected behavior after shadow restart), (4) false_positives/false_negatives tracking wired up (will populate when shadow disagrees with live at resolution), (5) Shadow data does NOT appear in /api/status or /api/analytics/pnl-history - full isolation confirmed. (6) UI shows unit-size badges, Size/Notional columns, and Resolution column in tables.
